name: Hou Get Parameter
description: Read a parameter value from a Houdini node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    node_path = inputs.get('node_path') or self.get_parameter('node_path', '')
    parm_name = inputs.get('parm_name') or self.get_parameter('parm_name', '')

    if not node_path or not parm_name:
        self.log_error('Node path and parameter name are required')
        await self.set_output('value', None)
        await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
        return {'value': None}

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        result = bridge.get_parm(node_path, parm_name)
        val = result['value']
        self.log_info(f'{node_path}/{parm_name} = {val}')
        await self.set_output('value', val)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to get parameter: {e}')
        await self.set_output('value', None)

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'value': self.get_parameter('value', None)}
